title: Rizaron
content:
{{Top|leg|italics=1}}
'''''Rizaron''''' was an [[Aramadia-class thrustship|''Aramadia''-class thrustship]] of the [[Duskhan League]] fleet.

==History==
''Rizaron'' was patrolling [[ILC-905 system|ILC-905]] with ''[[Tholos]]'', when it detected a [[New Republic Defense Fleet/Legends|New Republic Defense Fleet]] patrol. The two thrust ships ambushed the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] forces and succeeded in destroying [[Vanguard (Warrior-class)|''Vanguard'']]. A heavy counter attack in the last moments by ''Vanguard'' and the supporting Republic cruiser destroyed Rizaron, leaving ''Tholos'' to fight on alone.

==Appearances==
*''[[Tyrant's Test]]'' {{1st}}
*[[Tyrant's Test (abridged audiobook)|''Tyrant's Test'' abridged audiobook]]
